hero.title: Propelling Enterprise with
hero.description: I am a seasoned Fullstack Architect, specializing in the design and implementation of highly scalable enterprise applications with **Spring Boot (microservices, JWT security, Kafka)**. My expertise extends to creating fluid and reactive **Angular (Signals, SSR, Web Components)** user interfaces, enriched by the integration of **Generative AI (LLMs, RAG)** solutions and optimized by rigorous **DevOps (Kubernetes, CI/CD)** practices.

footer.location: Fullstack & AI • Based in Douala, CM (Remote Friendly)

skills.title: My Skills
skills.subtitle: A modern technological stack for scalable and intelligent solutions.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my most significant architectural achievements.

nexgen.title: NexGen E-Commerce Engine
nexgen.description: Intelligent commerce SaaS leveraging AI for dynamic stock optimization and customer personalization.
highlights: Backend based on Hexagonal Architecture to isolate the business domain from technical details.
Recommendation system powered by embedding vectors stored in ChromaDB.
Ultra-performant Angular UI using zoneless rendering and signals for instant reactivity.

opsmind.title: OpsMind: K8s AI Orchestrator
opsmind.description: Intelligent agent supervising Kubernetes clusters to predict failures and proactively auto-scale resources.
highlights: Real-time analysis of Prometheus metrics via a time-series model to anticipate load peaks.
Infrastructure as Code (IaC) developed with Terraform for multi-cloud deployment (AWS/Azure).
Integration of Kubernetes webhooks for automated remediation without human intervention.

experience.title: Professional Journey
experience.subtitle: A career path focused on technical excellence and continuous innovation.

exp1.description: Design of a modular ERP system integrating predictive analysis and automation via LLMs.
achievements: Migration from a monolithic architecture to Spring Cloud Microservices with asynchronous communication via Kafka.
Implementation of a semantic search engine based on RAG, increasing search accuracy by 65%.
Technical lead on the Angular Signals transition, reducing change detection cycles and improving UI FPS by 30%.
Full automation of Cloud provisioning via Terraform on AWS (EKS, RDS, S3).

exp2.description: Development of high-traffic e-commerce platforms with a focus on SEO optimization and high availability.
achievements: Development of a highly reactive Angular interface with fine-grained Lazy Loading and Bundle Size optimization.
Implementation of unit and integration tests (Junit, Mockito, Cypress) ensuring 85% code coverage.
Optimization of JPA/Hibernate queries and Redis caching, halving API response times.

contact.hero_title: Building the future with the power of AI
contact.description: Whether it's for a complex Spring Boot architecture, a high-performance Angular interface, or AI integration, I am here.
